{{Infobox character
| name = Miss Lakiri
| introduced = Of Kings and Killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Miss Lakiri]] is a gunner from [[Vandenyas]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c10">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Lakiri was left twitching and foaming at the mouth after the battle.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c12">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Lakiri was stung by [[Othaghor]]’s [[Slithers]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Lakiri is dead.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
